clusters.justification: These terms share co-activation within salience and extended subcortical circuits, reflecting a macroscopic functional axis dedicated to processing broad emotional valence and arousal.

Corresponding to ventromedial prefrontal and striatal co-activations, this domain represents the macroscopic system for computing subjective worth to integrate and drive motivated, goal-directed behavior.

Anchored by default-mode network co-activations, this functional domain reflects internally directed representational networks coordinating the conceptual mapping of the self, temporal narratives, and other interpersonal agents.
